evals.prompt: Prepare delivery pack for trump_19460614_105400_jamaica_ny natal
Build forecast pack when only solar_arc is available (no progressions)
evals.expected_output: PACK_MANIFEST.yaml with INCOMPLETE status, missing_methods lists secondary_progressions
